mapper.select: SELECT * FROM store_seller_grade WHERE ( grade_cycle > ${sellerGrade.gradeCycle} AND grade_lever >= ${sellerGrade.gradeLever} AND is_enabled = 1 AND is_delete = 0 ) OR ( grade_cycle >= ${sellerGrade.gradeCycle} AND grade_lever > ${sellerGrade.gradeLever} AND is_enabled = 1 AND is_delete = 0) ORDER BY sort_code

SELECT id, grade_name, email_push_count, email_account_count, sort_code, is_delete, is_enabled, is_default, grade_lever, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, grade_cycle, grade_price, grade_desc FROM store_seller_grade WHERE grade_lever > 0 and is_delete = 0 and is_enabled = 1 order by sort_code
